title: Awsome GemStones
description: this mod adds more Ingots, Armor, and tools by upgrading exisisting materials to make then stronger. New Mob The Crystal Mite.
body:
This mod adds new material types with new Tools and Armor that have special abilities when wearing the Whole Set. Blood Diamond, Energized Copper, Calamity Ingot, and Valkyre Ingot. All 4 armor give different buffs depending on the set you are wearing. (Warning do not mix and match armour you will NOT get the affect from all of them seperatly.) You may have to look out for the Gem Mite it packs quite a punch and won't be knocked around so easily.

This mod Is welcome in all modpacks and is encouraged to leave feedback with bugs and suggestions.
